title: RewindedItems
description: A mod adds newer versions' features in older versions.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/syvOu6WOpUc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Features:

1) It adds 1.21x features. For example, Mace, Heavy Core etc. 
2) Mod has 1.18.2, 1.16.5, 1.14.4 versions.
3) In the 1.16.5 version, it adds a lot of items and get very fast update.

More Features:

1) I'm gonna add new things on other updates. Likewise Copper Golem, more Copper blocks etc.
2) In the older versions the mod has some goofy things like VERY goofy go check out. 

Discord Server:

1) I may not be able to respond much because discord is closed in my country.
2) Link: https://discord.gg/Hd9ydF972P 

This mod adds:

-Mace

-Breeze Rod

-Copper

-Copper Items & Armor

-Bamboo Planks 

-Copper & Bamboo Door,Trapdoor

-Heavy Core

-Cherry Tree

-Cherry Biome
